ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-28-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jone, #3689.

Petitioner Joung-Mi Kang was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Helen Kang.
No Proof of Publication in the file. Matter is taken OFF CALENDAR. Petitioner advised to seek assistance at the Access Center.
